whale-pref-layout-scroll-buttons-help: Show the top, table-of-contents, and bottom buttons horizontally or vertically.
whale-pref-layout-floating-toc: Show right-side section index on desktop
whale-pref-live-recent-fixed-height-help: Keep the sidebar height stable even when the recent changes or discussions list has fewer items than the maximum.
whale-tooltip-purge: Purge the cache of this page.
whale.css: /* CSS placed here will affect users of the Whale skin */
whale.js: /* JavaScript placed here will be loaded for users of the Whale skin */
whale-pref-layout-width-help: Set the maximum width of the document area.
whale-pref-content-section-collapse-help: Choose how Whale handles section headings marked with #.
whale-pref-content-folding-help: Choose the initial display mode for NamuWiki-style {{{#!folding title ... }}} blocks.
whale-pref-theme-help: Choose the color palette Whale should use. Choose Default to use the site administrator's palette.
whale-pref-dark-help: Choose whether Whale follows the system setting or always uses dark or light mode.
whale-pref-ads-belowarticle: Remove ads below the article area.
right-blockads-header: Can remove header ads on the Whale skin.
right-blockads-right: Can remove right ads on the Whale skin.
right-blockads-belowarticle: Can remove below-article ads on the Whale skin.
right-blockads-bottom: Can remove bottom ads on the Whale skin.
